audit_items.proof_trace: The only dynamic allocation in cmsg.c is via nfp_app_ctrl_msg_alloc (called at L30 inside nfp_flower_cmsg_alloc). TX callers (portmod, portreify) pass the skb to nfp_ctrl_tx which takes ownership; mac_repr_start returns the skb to its caller which frees it via kfree_skb on all error paths and nfp_ctrl_tx on success. RX-path skbs (passed in from outside) are freed by dev_consume_skb_any/dev_kfree_skb_any on every branch of nfp_flower_cmsg_rx and nfp_flower_cmsg_process_one_rx, including the queue-overflow path in nfp_flower_queue_ctl_msg.
